'''Ord Mirit''' was originally one of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depots]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the planet's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison relocated to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the planet was a strategic world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Habeer Zignean]].<ref name="Rogues Gallery">{{InsiderCite|146|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: Clearance for Immediate Launch}}</ref>
